message: Fix Raidō badge/sidebar count mismatch with task list (v1.4.2)
Force re-auth when OAuth scopes change (v0.21.9)
Sync display name to Gmail sendAs settings so From header works (v0.21.8)
Fix TypeScript errors: unread prop, missing fetcher, snoozeUntil destructuring
Add kenaz_forward_email MCP tool and fix reply threading headers (v0.21.8)
Add dynamic changelog and version numbers to landing page
Add filesystem reconciliation to keep Laguz index in sync (v1.8.5)
Wire up Edit button in Dagaz event detail (v0.19.6)
Enable text selection for emails, phone numbers, and links in Kenaz & Dagaz
Add clickable clear button for orphaned sync queue entries
